_doc: Vertical layer registry consumed by scripts/worldgen/cave_generator.gd and
the world scene. Layer 0 is the surface (generated by world_generator.gd);
negative layers are caves generated with cellular automata seeded from the
world seed + layer + chunk coords, so they are deterministic and chunk
fill: initial wall probability. iterations: CA smoothing passes.
floorTile/wallTile: tile ids from biomes.json. lightRadius: visible tiles
around the player; torchSkill/torchPerLevel: the radius grows with that
skill's level (the 'torch'). oreLevelBonus: shifts the zone level band so
deeper layers roll higher-level ores. skillWeights: gather skill mix.
monsterDensity scales spawns; monsters come from monsters.json rules whose
caveLayers include this layer. locked + lockMessage: entry refused.
To add a layer: append an entry -- ladders down appear automatically in

-3.name: The Underworld
-3.lockMessage: A dark power seals the way down... (future content)
